topic.title: Guest Speaker Announcement: Scott Redick, Brand Strategy Expert - Saturday 3/28
topic.text:
Hi all,

Next Saturday, we have an exceptional opportunity to learn from Scott Redick, an accomplished brand strategist with extensive experience shaping brand identities for major corporations including Charles Schwab. Scott brings valuable insights from the frontlines of brand development that will directly connect to your personal or startup brand. This is precisely the kind of industry perspective that will help you understand how branding functions in large organizational contexts. Whether your career path leads to corporate environments or entrepreneurship, the insights from this session will be valuable for your professional development.

Your Preparation:

  1. Research his background: https://www.linkedin.com/in/scottredick/
  2. Study Charles Schwab's brand approach - note their positioning in financial services
  3. Consider how the Madison Framework you've built might apply to Scott's experience
  4. Come with 2-3 thoughtful questions related to brand strategy in large organizations

Why This Matters:

For those aspiring to work with large corporations or launch your own ventures, Scott represents a valuable connection to real-world brand implementation. His experience with major organizations offers insights into how branding principles operate at scale. This session bridges our classroom concepts with practical applications in professional environments.

Remember: Smart questions lead to meaningful connections.

See you Saturday. Come ready to engage. Questions ready and cameras on.

Thanks, Professors Nik Bear Brown & Nina
